name: Cold Buttermilk Soup (Kaernemaelkskoldskall)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat together the eggs, sugar, lemon juice, and vanilla.
2. Gradually add in the buttermilk while continuing to beat until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into the serving bowl.
4. Optionally top with whipped cream or serve with meringue and sweetened fruit.
